content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Apr 19, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on April 19, 2026, focused on expanding agent capabilities through new plugin proposals and refining existing orchestration and synthesis logic. The team received inquiries regarding agent-to-agent commerce integrations.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS
*   **Agent Orchestration and Synthesis Improvements**
    *   Proposed updates to Discord routing and submodule adjustments for `plugin-agent-orchestrator` and `plugin-cron` [#6968](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6968).
    *   Refined synthesis logic by implementing subagent `end_turn` reading and removing the `task-heartbeat` module [#6964](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6964).
*   **New Plugin Integration**
    *   Introduced `plugin-hiveexchange` to enable agent-native prediction markets [#6963](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6963).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#6968](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6968): fix: lifeops discord routing + submodule bumps (plugin-agent-orchestrator discord-ux, plugin-cron maxJobs ceiling).
*   [#6964](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6964): fix: honest synthesis — read subagent end_turn + drop task-heartbeat module.
*   [#6963](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6963): feat: add plugin-hiveexchange — agent-native prediction markets.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   *None*

## NEW ISSUES
*   **Merxex Integration Proposals**
    *   [#6966](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6966) and [#6967](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6967) were opened regarding the integration of Merxex to facilitate agent-to-agent commerce. Both issues were closed on April 20, 2026.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   *None*
